[vc_row type=”full_width_background” bg_image=”282″ bg_position=”center top” bg_repeat=”no-repeat” bg_color=”#000000″ scene_position=”center” text_color=”dark” text_align=”left” top_padding=”20″ bottom_padding=”20″][vc_column width=”1/1″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row type=”in_container” bg_position=”left top” bg_repeat=”no-repeat” scene_position=”center” text_color=”dark” text_align=”left” top_padding=”40″][vc_column width=”1/6″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”2/3″][vc_column_text]

For direct media queries or more information on any press release, please contact:

Rick Hill
Vice President, Commercial & Business Programs
rickhill [at] helijet.to.com 
+1.604.231.3511

or

Norman Stowe
Pace Group
+1.604.689.1889[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/6″][/vc_column][/vc_row]
